title: Monorepo + pnpm + TS/ESM + CI (build/test/lint) skeleton; agent-neutral core + adapters seam
context: ATLTUAE's spine (provenance store, budget governor, coverage ledger, cycle orchestrator) needs a foundation to build on. Per Elyos architecture rules the core must be agent-neutral with any vendor/agent-specific (Claude/Anthropic) logic isolated behind an adapters seam, and funded execution lives only in a runner package. This M0 task sets up the monorepo, toolchain, and green CI so every later task lands against a passing build/test/lint pipeline.
objective: Stand up the monorepo skeleton: pnpm workspaces, TypeScript/ESM, build/test/lint scripts, and CI that runs them green, with an agent-neutral core package and an adapters seam for vendor-specific (LLM client) logic.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspace with TypeScript + ESM configured; `pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint` all pass locally and in CI
Agent-neutral core package present with no vendor/agent-specific code; an adapters/ seam exists where the LLM client (Claude/Anthropic) specifics will live
CI workflow runs build/test/lint on every push/PR and is green on the initial skeleton
Commits are DCO signed-off; repository conventions (lint, formatting) documented in the repo
